tests.test_body:
define void @pr105785(ptr %p) {
entry:
  br label %for.cond

for.cond:                                         ; preds = %for.cond1, %entry
  %for.ind = phi i32 [ 0, %entry ], [ 1, %for.cond1 ]
  %cmp = icmp eq i32 %for.ind, 0
  br i1 %cmp, label %for.cond1, label %for.end6

for.cond1:                                        ; preds = %for.body3, %for.cond
  %for.ind2 = phi i32 [ %inc, %for.body3 ], [ 0, %for.cond ]
  %cmp2 = icmp ult i32 %for.ind2, 3
  br i1 %cmp2, label %for.body3, label %for.cond

for.body3:                                        ; preds = %for.cond1
  %scmp = call i32 @llvm.scmp.i32.i32(i32 %for.ind, i32 1)
  store i32 %scmp, ptr %p, align 4
  %inc = add nuw nsw i32 %for.ind2, 1
  br label %for.cond1

for.end6:                                         ; preds = %for.cond
  ret void
}

issue.title: [ConstraintElim] Miscompilation with cmp intrinsic
issue.author: dtcxzyw

history.commit_message:
[ConstraintElimination] Add support for UCMP/SCMP intrinsics (#97974)

This adds checks to fold calls to `ucmp`/`scmp` where a comparative
relationship between the arguments can be established.

tests.test_body:
define i8 @scmp_2(i32 %x, i32 %y) {
  %cond = icmp sge i32 %x, %y
  br i1 %cond, label %true, label %false

true:                                             ; preds = %0
  ret i8 20

false:                                            ; preds = %0
  %r = call i8 @llvm.scmp.i8.i32(i32 %x, i32 %y)
  ret i8 %r
}
